'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 84''' was the eighty-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 6]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]
*[[Pre-Republic era|A Time of Expansion]]
*[[Logray/Legends|Logray]]
*[[Danni Quee]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Naberrie family/Legends|Naberrie Family]] Home
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Starship/Legends|Starship]] [[Docking Bay 94/Legends|Docking Bays]]
*[[Fly eye|Fly Eye]]
*[[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi Field Equipment]]
*[[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bomber]]
